parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022', max_tokens: 600, system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt }] }) }}

meta.notes: Required env vars: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY (service role), ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, PUSH_LAMBDA_URL. Requires tables: child_profiles, story_sessions, child_dynamic_context, notification_preferences, morning_reactions. Cron fires 7am UTC daily.
